details: The scheme “Funeral Benefit” is a social security scheme, implemented by the Meghalaya Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (MBOCWWB), Labour Department, Government of Meghalaya. Under the scheme, financial assistance shall be provided to nominees or dependents of deceased registered construction workers, towards funeral expenses.
benefits: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- shall be given to nominees or dependents of deceased registered construction workers, towards funeral expenses.
eligibility: The applicant should be a legal nominee or dependent of deceased worker.
The deceased worker should have been a resident of Meghalaya.
The deceased worker should have been engaged in any building or other construction work.
The deceased worker should have been registered under the Meghalaya Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The financial assistance shall be given to nominees or dependents of deceased registered workers, towards funeral expenses.

offline: The applicants may visit the online Portal:
The applicant can register by creating a new account, on the home page click on the ‘Worker’ button and enter all the mandatory information.
After filling in all the details, click on ‘Register’.
After successful registration, the applicant will see the message “Registered Successfully”.
Enter your User ID (Registered Mobile Number), Password, and Enter Security Code. Click on Login.
After successful login, click on the “Funeral Benefit” scheme from the Dashboard.
Fill in all the required information and necessary enclosures.
From the menu, click on ‘Track Application Status’.
Click on ‘View Details’ to view your application.
Click on ‘Application History’ to view the application history.
Click on ‘Update’ to update your application.
Once your application is under process or processed, you cannot update it.

documents_required: Challan/Receipt of the Monthly Subscription paid
Nominee's ID Proof may be Voter ID, Licence or others
Guardian Certificate (in case Applicant is Minor)

faqs.question: What is “Funeral Benefit” scheme?
faqs.answer: The “Funeral Benefit” scheme is a social security scheme that provides financial assistance to the nominees/dependents of a deceased member, towards funeral expenses.

faqs.question: Which department has implemented this Scheme?
faqs.answer: Meghalaya Building And Other Construction Workers Welfare Board

faqs.question: Who is eligible to receive benefits under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The legal nominees or dependents of deceased registered construction workers are eligible to receive benefits under the Funeral Benefit Scheme.

faqs.question: How much financial assistance is provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: A financial assistance of ₹5,000/- is provided to the nominees or dependents of deceased registered construction workers to cover funeral expenses.

faqs.question: Can the financial assistance be transferred to a bank account?
faqs.answer: Yes, the financial assistance can usually be transferred to the bank account of the nominee or dependent upon submission of the necessary banking details.

faqs.question: How can the application be submitted?
faqs.answer: Applications can be made online at http://megbocwwb.gov.in/bocw_services

faqs.question: Can the application be tracked?
faqs.answer: Yes, applications can be tracked from the Dashboard after logging into http://megbocwwb.gov.in/bocw_services
